title: Pair 06: No Abandonment vs Abandonment Enabled
summary: This comparison keeps the bubble-tea shop, a compact stress peak with many short-stay groups, and the core service rules the same, but changes what happens when waits get too long. Option A assumes everyone stays, while Option B allows some parties to leave so you can see the trade-off between a shorter line and lost guests.

A.label: Everyone stays in line
A.notes: The lounge absorbs all demand, even when the queue stretches and impatient guests keep waiting.

B.label: Impatient guests can leave
B.notes: The queue shortens because some guests walk away once their wait crosses their tolerance threshold.
